Kadir Has University

Business Administration

Kadir Has University Department of Business Administration aims to provide students with an innovative and practical education in line with the dynamics of today's business world. With its project-based education model, the department combines theoretical knowledge with practice by supporting its students with sectoral collaborations and mentoring support. The department continuously strengthens its interaction with the academic environment through events and research projects.
